info.title: QueryGuardAI Backend
info.description: Backend API for QueryGuardAI - Data Lineage and Impact Analysis Tool

post.description:
Public signup endpoint - creates users with MEMBER role only.
For creating users with other roles, use /users endpoint (requires authentication and appropriate role).
org_id should be provided as a query parameter in the signup link.

Change password for authenticated user.
Requires current password verification and sets new password.

get.description: List all organizations (PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN only)

post.description:
Create a new organization with first SYSTEM_ADMIN user (PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN only).
Automatically creates the first user with SYSTEM_ADMIN role using the provided username and email.
No password is required - a password setup link will be sent via email.

get.description:
Get KPI data for all organizations with users and role counts.
Returns all organizations with their respective users and KPI metadata.
(PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN only)
Get organization details by ID (PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN only)

post.description:
Create a new user with role assignment.
Requires: PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN, SYSTEM_ADMIN, or ORGANIZATION_ADMIN
org_id should be provided as a query parameter in the link.

get.description:
List users.
PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN can list users from any organization.
Others can only list users from their own organization.

Get user details by ID.
PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN can access any user.
Others can only access users from their own organization.

put.description:
Update user details.
PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN can update any user.
Others can only update users from their own organization.
Role changes are validated based on assigner's permissions.

delete.description:
Deactivate user (soft delete).
PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN can deactivate any user.
Others can only deactivate users from their own organization.

post.description: Test Snowflake connection before saving
Save Snowflake connection after successful test

get.description: List all Snowflake connections for the organization

schema.title: Response List Connections Snowflake Connections Get

get.description: Fetch all databases from Snowflake connection
Fetch schemas for a specific database

post.description: Save database selections for a connection
Save schema selections for a specific database

schema.title: Response Get Selected Databases Snowflake Selected Databases  Connection Id  Get

get.description: Get selected schemas for a specific database

schema.title: Response Get Selected Schemas Snowflake Selected Schemas  Connection Id   Database Name  Get

get.description: Fetch all databases with their schemas in hierarchical format

schema.title: Response Fetch Database Schema Structure Snowflake Database Schema Structure  Connection Id  Get

post.description: Save database and schema selections from UI structure with flexible selection options

Demo helper: given a connection_id, automatically
- fetches and stores all databases
- fetches and stores schemas for each database
- marks all databases and schemas as selected

This is intended to speed up demos by skipping manual multi-step setup.

get.description: Redirect to GitHub App installation with org_id as state
Handle GitHub App installation callback
List all GitHub installations for the organization

schema.title: Response List Installations Github Installations Get

get.description: List repositories for a specific installation

schema.title: Response List Repositories Github Repositories  Installation Id  Get

post.description: Sync repositories for an installation (manual trigger)
Handle GitHub webhook events (PR events)
Process PR changes and add comment to PR

get.description: Fetch stored PR analysis by its UUID with enhanced lineage data

Save Jira connection after successful test

Response List Connections Dbt Cloud Connections Get

post.description:
Chat with LLM using vector database context for a specific organization.
Optionally saves chat history if thread_id is provided.

Args:
    request: ChatRequest containing message and optional parameters
    thread_id: Optional thread ID for saving chat history (query parameter)
    current_user: Authenticated user (from token)
    db: Database session
    
Returns:
    ChatResponse with LLM response and source documents

get.description:
Get all chat threads for the authenticated user.
Returns threads ordered by last_message_at (most recent first).

schema.title: Response Get User Chat Threads Chat Threads Get

post.description:
Create a new chat thread for the authenticated user.

Returns:
    ChatThreadResponse with thread details

get.description: Get a specific chat thread with all its messages.

delete.description: Soft delete a chat thread (sets is_active to False).

put.description: Update the title of a chat thread.

post.description:
Create a new conversation for an organization.
DEPRECATED: Use /threads endpoint instead.

Args:
    org_id: Organization ID
    
Returns:
    ChatConversation object

get.description:
Health check for chat service.

Returns:
    Status of chat service

Test if vector store is available for an organization.

Args:
    org_id: Organization ID
    
Returns:
    Test result

Get all active chat sessions for an organization.

Args:
    org_id: Organization ID
    
Returns:
    List of active chat sessions

schema.title: Response Get Active Chat Sessions Chat Sessions  Org Id  Get

get.description:
Get WebSocket connection statistics.

Returns:
    Chat statistics

post.description:
Manually trigger cleanup of inactive sessions.

Args:
    timeout_minutes: Minutes of inactivity before cleanup
    
Returns:
    Cleanup result

get.description: Serve a simple test page for WebSocket functionality.

Get dashboard overview data with KPIs and pull request information.
Accessible by any authenticated user (any role).

post.description:
TEMPORARY ENDPOINT: Initialize QueryGuardAI system.

Creates:
1. QueryGuardAI organization (if it doesn't exist)
2. First PRODUCT_SUPPORT_ADMIN user with hardcoded credentials

⚠️  WARNING: This endpoint should be removed or protected after initial setup!
⚠️  Default credentials: admin / admin@queryguardai.com / Admin@123

This is a one-time setup endpoint. It will not create duplicate organizations or users.

get.description: Check the status of the background Snowflake crawler worker
